mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, status_id, user_id, title, subject_ids, grade_id, province_id, city_id, district_id, address, tutor_gender, tutor_type_pref, budget_min, budget_max, contact_name, contact_mobile, req_status, audit_remark, view_count, application_count
mapper.select:
select distinct , from tutor_requirement
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tutor_requirement (id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, status_id, user_id, title, subject_ids, grade_id, province_id, city_id, district_id, address, tutor_gender, tutor_type_pref, budget_min, budget_max, contact_name, contact_mobile, req_status, audit_remark, view_count, application_count, schedule, requirement_detail) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subjectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gradeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tutorGender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{tutorTypePref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{budgetMin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{budgetMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{applicationCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{schedule,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{requirementDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into tutor_requirement
id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, status_id, user_id, title, subject_ids, grade_id, province_id, city_id, district_id, address, tutor_gender, tutor_type_pref, budget_min, budget_max, contact_name, contact_mobile, req_status, audit_remark, view_count, application_count, schedule, requirement_detail,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subjectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gradeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tutorGender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{tutorTypePref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{budgetMin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{budgetMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{applicationCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{schedule,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{requirementDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update: update tutor_requirement gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_id = #{record.statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, subject_ids = #{record.subjectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, grade_id = #{record.gradeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, province_id = #{record.provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, city_id = #{record.cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, district_id = #{record.districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tutor_gender = #{record.tutorGender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, tutor_type_pref = #{record.tutorTypePref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, budget_min = #{record.budgetMin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, budget_max = #{record.budgetMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, contact_name = #{record.contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_mobile = #{record.contactMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, req_status = #{record.reqStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, audit_remark = #{record.auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, view_count = #{record.viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, application_count = #{record.applicationCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, schedule = #{record.schedule,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, requirement_detail = #{record.requirementDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update tutor_requirement gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_id = #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, subject_ids = #{subjectIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, grade_id = #{gradeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, province_id = #{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, city_id = #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, district_id = #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tutor_gender = #{tutorGender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, tutor_type_pref = #{tutorTypePref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, budget_min = #{budgetMin,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, budget_max = #{budgetMax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, contact_name = #{contactName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_mobile = #{contactMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, req_status = #{reqStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, view_count = #{viewCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, application_count = #{applicationCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, schedule = #{schedule,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, requirement_detail = #{requirementDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
